name: Logic
description: This algorithm is based on the disting mk4 algorithm of the same name. It performs various logical operations on its X & Y inputs for each channel, including AND, OR, XOR, NAND, NOR, XNOR, SR flip-flop, D flip-flop, and comparison operations. Each channel is independent and can be chained internally by setting inputs to outputs of other channels. Global parameters set the threshold and hysteresis of input comparators.
gui_description: The display shows the various logical operations being performed. Disabled channels are grayed out. Inverted inputs and outputs are indicated using the standard logic notation of a bar above the inverted quantity.
